welcome: Hi! I'm your robot car! Let's learn how self-driving cars work!
menu_subtitle: Collect all 5 parts to build your self-driving car!
menu_all_done: All parts collected! Your robot car is complete!
q1_start: Quest 1! Electric cars need batteries. Too few and the car stops. Too many and it's too heavy! Find the right number.
q1_desc: Electric cars have a big battery under the floor. Too few batteries means the car stops halfway. Too many means the car is too heavy! Find the right number.
q1_perfect: Perfect! That's just the right amount of batteries!
q1_too_many: Whoa, too many batteries! The car is way too heavy!
q2_start: Quest 2! An electric motor spins to move the car. When you brake, the motor runs backwards and charges the battery! Try it!
q2_desc: An electric motor spins to move the car. When you brake, the motor runs backwards and charges the battery! This is called regenerative braking.
q2_fast: Wow, you're going fast! Watch the battery drain!
q2_regen: Amazing! You discovered regenerative braking! The battery is charging!
q2_done: Great job! You learned how electric motors and regenerative braking work!
q3_start: Quest 3! The car has cameras but its AI brain needs to learn. Look at each picture and tell the car: should it stop or go?
q3_desc: The car has cameras but its AI brain needs to learn. Should the car stop or go?
q3_correct: Got it! Great job teaching the car!
q3_wrong: Oops! Let's try to remember that one!
q3_done: Training complete! Let's see how smart the car is now!
summary: Here's what the car learned from your training data!
summary_desc: You fed the AI correct examples. Here's what it knows.
summary_bias: Warning! Most of the training data is about one category. The car might struggle with other situations!
q4_start: Quest 4! Your car is on the road. See what the AI thinks, then you decide: stop or go!
q4_desc: Your car is on the road! See what the AI thinks, then decide.
q4_correct: Nice call! You and the AI agree!
q4_wrong: Oops! The AI got confused. It still needs more training!
q4_retrain: The car made too many mistakes. Let's go back and train it more!
q5_start: Quest 5! The car drives itself now! Watch for AI mistakes and hit override to help!
q5_desc: The car drives itself now! Watch for AI mistakes and hit override to help!
q5_save: Great save! You caught the AI's mistake!
q5_crash: Oops! The AI made a wrong choice!
q5_ai_right: The AI got it right this time!
q5_done: Amazing! Even smart AI makes mistakes. That's why self-driving cars still need a human paying attention!
q5_lesson: Even smart AI makes mistakes! That's why self-driving cars still need a human paying attention. You were the safety driver!
all_done: You did it! You built a whole self-driving car! Come back anytime to play again!
